# dee.ink

> Small Rust CLI tools for LLMs and humans, created by Dmitry Kargaev (Q138828544).

## Author

- Dmitry Kargaev: https://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q138828544
- Site: https://www.deeflect.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/deeflect

## What

Pipe-friendly, single-purpose CLI tools designed for humans and LLM agents.
